reviews.comment:
Nos pusieron nafta en vez de gasoil.. una camioneta gasolera... Perdimos 6 horas de viaje porque no tenían un mecánico y los playeros no estaban capacitados. Un desastre!!!!

(Translated by Google)
They put gasoline in our tank instead of diesel... a diesel truck! We lost six hours of our trip because they didn't have a mechanic and the attendants weren't trained. A disaster!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnbWZyVk1nEAE

reviews.comment:
Después de un largo y seco viaje por la Puna de Atacama, llegar aqui es como un Oasis en el desierto. Hay Internet.

(Translated by Google)
After a long, dry journey across the Atacama Plateau, arriving here is like finding an oasis in the desert. There's internet access.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRZ0l6N0pREAE

reviews.comment:
Es un paso fronterizo VEHICULAR, es decir, no aceptan peatones. Hay unos dos hospedajes en elpequeño caserio que esta adjunto al control fronterizo unificado y la estacion de servicio YPF tiene un hotel tambien, pertenecen al ACA.

(Translated by Google)
It's a vehicular border crossing, meaning pedestrians are not allowed. There are two lodgings in the small village adjacent to the unified border control, and the YPF gas station also has a hotel. They belong to the ACA.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBd2F1d053EAE
